meaning: n.迥ｯ鄂ｪ,豁ｹ蠕貞所蜈ｶ迥ｯ鄂ｪ陦御ｸｺ
examples: Blood feuds and general gangsterism added to the local crime rate.
The music business "is one of the sleaziest businesses there is", Mr Richards argues, only one step above gangsterism.
I enjoy gangster films as much as anyone else, and I don't deny there is an Italian Mafia (although gangsterism is certainly not exclusive to us).
Indeed, far from reducing crime, prohibition has fostered gangsterism on a scale that the world has never seen before.
Overt gangsterism may be less pervasive than in other big Russian cities.
